hero.title:
YoStudy — Stress-Free Admission to Austria.
We will handle everything for you
hero.subtitle: We guarantee successful university admission in Austria. Professional team, transparent process, and full support from the very first step to moving in.

about.title: About Company
about.p1_text: is a professional educational agency specializing in comprehensive admission support for Ukrainian students entering universities in Austria. We work directly with Austrian educational institutions and official authorities, ensuring document precision, strict adherence to deadlines, and a guaranteed outcome.
about.p2_text: Our team has years of experience studying and working in Austria, so we thoroughly understand every step — from document submission to post-relocation adaptation. We combine European professionalism with a personalized approach to make the admission process simple, predictable, and calm for our clients.

consultation.title: Free Consultation
consultation.subtitle: Understand all the nuances of education in Austria with our experts.
consultation.text: We will study your case in detail, assess your admission chances, help you choose the right university, and create a step-by-step personalized action plan. Leave a request, and we will contact you as shortly as possible.

vienna.desc: The capital of student life in Austria. A hub of culture, innovation, and international education. It hosts the country's largest concentration of universities and student opportunities.

list.name: University of Vienna (1365)
list.text: One of the oldest and largest universities in Europe. Renowned in humanities, natural sciences, social sciences, and international relations.

list.name: TU Wien (1815)
list.text: Austria's leading technical university. Well-known for its programs in engineering, IT, architecture, and robotics.

list.name: WU Wien (1898)
list.text: One of the best economic universities in Europe. Specializes in business, finance, management, and international economics.

list.name: Medical University of Vienna (2004)
list.text: The largest medical university in Austria and one of the leading medical centers in Europe.

list.name: BOKU University (1872)
list.text: A leader in ecology, biotechnology, food technology, sustainable development, and natural sciences.

list.name: MODUL University Vienna (2007)
list.text: A modern international private university. Particularly strong in tourism, management, and sustainable development.

list.name: Webster Vienna Private University (1981)
list.text: An American private university offering an international educational system and a multicultural environment.

list.name: Sigmund Freud University (2005)
list.text: A private university widely known for its programs in psychology, psychotherapy, medicine, and law.

graz.desc: One of the most comfortable student cities in Austria, featuring a remarkably cozy and welcoming atmosphere.

list.name: University of Graz (1585)
list.text: One of the oldest universities in the country. Strong in humanities, natural sciences, and social sciences.

list.name: Graz University of Technology (1811)
list.text: One of Austria's leading technical universities in the fields of engineering, IT, and robotics.

list.name: Medical University of Graz (2004)
list.text: A modern medical university with high-impact scientific research and solid clinical practice.

innsbruck.desc: A city nestled in the Alps, where studying perfectly blends with incredible nature and an active lifestyle.

list.name: University of Innsbruck (1669)
list.text: One of Austria's most prestigious universities, offering strong programs in natural, human, and social sciences.

list.name: MCI Innsbruck (1995)
list.text: A practically oriented university with robust programs in business, management, and tourism.

list.name: Medical University of Innsbruck (2004)
list.text: One of the country's leading hubs for medical sciences with a powerful research base.

salzburg.desc: The city of Mozart, internationally famous for its stunning architecture and Old World European atmosphere.

list.name: Paris Lodron University Salzburg (1622)
list.text: A classical university with prominent programs in law, communications, and natural sciences.

list.name: Mozarteum University Salzburg (1841)
list.text: One of Europe's most famous arts universities, specializing in music and the performing arts.

list.name: FH Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (1995)
list.text: A modern applied university with market-driven programs in IT, business, media, and tourism.

linz.desc: A peaceful, modern city with a technological edge and a very high quality of life.

list.name: Johannes Kepler University Linz (1966)
list.text: A modern university offering a wide spectrum of programs across technical, economic, and natural sciences.

list.name: University of Arts Linz (1973)
list.text: A leading arts university, widely recognized for design, digital arts, and media.

list.name: FH Oberösterreich – University of Applied Sciences (1994)
list.text: One of the top universities of applied sciences in Austria, maintaining strong ties to business and industry.

klagenfurt.desc: A charming, picturesque lakeside city near Wörthersee, highly popular among students.

list.name: Alpen-Adria University Klagenfurt (1970)
list.text: An international university featuring strong programs in information technology, management, and social sciences.

list.name: FH Kärnten – University of Applied Sciences (1995)
list.text: A practically focused university with core programs in engineering, IT, and management.

list.name: AAU School of Management (2002)
list.text: A business school with a clear focus on management, entrepreneurship, innovation, and international business.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Precision that opens the doors to Austrian education
documents.text:
Document preparation is one of the most critical stages of admission in Austria. Our team fully accompanies this process, monitoring every single detail from the first consultation to university submission. We analyze the specific requirements of your chosen institution, create a tailored list of necessary documents, and help avoid mistakes that could lead to delays or rejection.

We organize official translations, notarized copies, apostilles, and legalization. Every procedure is performed strictly when required by the university or Austrian authorities — we do not impose unnecessary services or create extra expenses. We take full responsibility for the correctness of your paperwork so you can focus on planning your future.

features.text: In-depth analysis of the specific requirements of your chosen university
Compiling a complete and comprehensive document package for admission
Verifying the compliance of all documents with the educational institution's criteria
Arranging official translations and notarization wherever necessary
Handling apostille and legalization procedures according to Austrian standards
Strict deadline tracking and monitoring of document readiness statuses
Final review of the full package and direct submission to the university

admission.title: Guaranteed Admission
admission.subtitle: Official enrollment in your chosen university in Austria.
admission.text: We completely oversee the university application process, handle official communication with the admissions committee, and promptly resolve any issues that arise right up until you receive your official letter of acceptance (Zulassungsbescheid).

features.text: Registration for admission language exams (German A2–C1 or English IELTS, TOEFL)
Full monitoring of the admission process and communication with the university
Registration for the university placement test
Registration for university preparation courses (VWU) or language courses
Registration for the entrance exam (if applicable)
Provision of all necessary preparation materials for the entrance exam
Passing the mandatory OSA test
Creating a personal student account
Arranging the student ID card
Assistance with paying the ÖH-Beitrag student union fee

dormitory.title: Dormitory Search and Booking
dormitory.subtitle: Comfortable and safe housing for students
dormitory.text:
Moving to Austria begins with finding accommodation, as official confirmation of residence is a mandatory requirement for obtaining a student visa. We take over this entire process and select a dormitory or student residence according to your preferences, city of study, and budget. Thanks to our cooperation with verified residences across Austria, we offer the best options at competitive prices without unnecessary overpayments.

You do not need to handle correspondence on your own or figure out complex Austrian rental regulations. Our goal is for the student to arrive with everything ready, and for parents to feel absolutely confident in their child's safety and comfort. YO STUDY — we organize your student housing from the very first request to check-in.
dormitory.features_title: We accompany the entire process from start to finish:

features.text: We select housing tailored to your request and budget — from affordable student rooms to modern premium-class residences
We book the room in the chosen residence
We prepare and approve all required documents
We arrange the official signing of the lease agreement
We provide official confirmation of accommodation required for your visa and admission

adaptation.title: Adaptation
adaptation.subtitle: Your confident start in Austria
adaptation.text: We provide full student support after your relocation and handle all key organizational matters, allowing you to fully focus on your studies and new opportunities.
adaptation.footer_text: We stay by your side not only until your admission but throughout your entire adaptation period in Austria.

features.text: Processing of a student residence permit or temporary protection status
Residential address registration and preparation of required documents
Opening a bank account and obtaining a bank card
Arranging medical insurance
Setting up mobile communication and getting a SIM card
Ongoing consultation and support for administrative and daily life issues

contact.description: Enter your phone number and our manager will call you back, or choose your preferred messenger to start a chat instantly.
contact.telegram_message: Hello! I am from the YO Study website. Please contact me regarding a consultation. My phone number is: {phone}
contact.direct_message: Hello! I am from the YO Study website. I would like to get a free consultation.
contact.plan_message: Hello! I am from the YO Study website. I am interested in a consultation regarding the service package: {planName}.

pricing.title: Choose your service package
pricing.subtitle: Transparent conditions, fixed costs, and no hidden fees for your peace of mind.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Consultations and a detailed step-by-step plan for self-guided admission under expert supervision.
basic.f1: Personalized online consultation and strategy formulation
basic.f2: University selection and faculty requirements analysis
basic.f3: Detailed instructions for self-guided document submission

optimal.title: Optimal
optimal.desc: Full support and university document submission with oversight at every single stage.
optimal.f1: Document submission to 1 university (up to 2 faculties)
optimal.f2: Admission process monitoring and communication with the university
optimal.f3: Collection, comprehensive translation, and notarization of documents
optimal.f4: Registration for the placement test and university preparation courses (VWU)
optimal.f5: Search, selection, and guaranteed booking of a student dormitory

premium.title: Premium
premium.desc: Maximum support package: extended document submission, exams, and on-site adaptation support.
premium.f1: Document submission to 2 universities (up to 4 faculties)
premium.f2: All services included in the "Basic" and "Optimal" packages
premium.f3: Entrance exam / OSA test (exam fee is already included)
premium.f4: Provision of mandatory preparation study materials
premium.f5: Full adaptation: assistance at the Magistrat for residence permit, banking, and insurance
